texto: There's this moment, just before it happens, when everything around you goes still. It's like that moment you get just before it snows - like nature is holding its breath ... And in that moment, anything is possible, and everything you know is called into question.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Miranda Dickinson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “There's this moment, just before it happens, when everything around you goes still. It's like tha…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, falling-in-love, snow pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de snow.
